summary: PR #2733 was a decomp/matching improvement slice for Dolphin THP decoding plus Melee trophy/toy display files. Evidence shows THPDec.c was the main hotspot, with header prototype corrections and extensive THP parsing/decode rewrites, while toy.c, tydisplay.c, and tyfigupon.c received local matching improvements. Review feedback focused on keeping source reviewable: avoid include macro-renaming, restore comments, revert raw asm, keep ordinary float literals inline, use PAD_STACK instead of dummy local buffers, remove match-percentage comments, and restore inline/helper usages.

key_files.role: THP header prototype updates for recovered function signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPDec_80330158 return type s32 -> u8

key_files.role: Main THP decode implementation hotspot; added typed local views, signature changes, marker parsing/control-flow changes, and matching improvements.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: reviewer notes call THPDec.c the main review hotspot
text_corpus bot report: THPVideoDecode, __THPReadFrameHeader, __THPHuffGenerateSizeTable, THPDec_803313D0 new matches

key_files.role: Toy/trophy implementation matching improvements with review feedback on literals, stack padding, and removing match-percent comments.
evidence_refs: review discussion r3438203295: Revert named literals
review discussion r3438209956: Use PAD_STACK, with scope blocks if necessary

key_files.role: Trophy display/grid positioning matching improvements with review feedback on literals and inline helper usage.
evidence_refs: review discussion r3438219962: Restore inline function usages

key_files.role: Toy/trophy figure implementation matching improvements; detailed diff not fully available in loaded excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: tyfigupon functions and .sdata improved/new matches

what_changed: Updated THP header prototypes for __THPReadFrameHeader to take THPFileInfo* and THPDec_80330158 to return u8.
Reworked THPDec.c parsing/decode code, including JFIF parsing locals, THPVideoDecode status/error handling, THP scan/frame local view structs, component selector fields, and helper return types.

Added or refined local temporary structs/views in THPDec.c such as THPVideoDecodeHeader, THPVideoDecodeInfoView, THPScanComp, THPScanInfo, THPFrameHeaderComp, and THPFrameHeaderInfo in the diff excerpt.
Toy/trophy files received implementation-level matching improvements; bot report lists new matches and fuzzy-score improvements in toy, tydisplay, and tyfigupon units.
PR body reports clean verification: clang-format/check scripts, ninja, dol_diff, changes_all, and a structured report sweep with regressions=0.

smart_moves.text: The PR kept scope narrow to THPDec.c and ty toy/trophy implementation files, making a large decomp/matching slice reviewable.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: branch focused to THPDec.c and src/melee/ty toy/trophy files

smart_moves.text: The PR included verification and bot-reported match improvements, including several 100% matches in THPDec and tyfigupon.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: 8 new matches and 25 improvements in unmatched items

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not hide prototype conflicts or recovered signatures behind include-time macro renames; update the real header/signature surface instead when evidence supports it.
evidence_refs: review discussion r3438185960: reviewer suggested replacing macro rename block with plain #include <dolphin/thp/thp.h>
raw_diff: thp.h prototype corrections for __THPReadFrameHeader and THPDec_80330158

decomp_lessons.lesson: Raw asm should be reverted for normal recoverable C bodies; an asm THPInit replacement was specifically rejected in review.
evidence_refs: review discussion r3438200177: Revert raw asm

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not replace ordinary numeric literals with address-named float loads solely for matching/data pressure; reviewers asked to use or revert to literals.
evidence_refs: review discussion r3438203295: Revert named literals for -3000.0F/3000.0F comparisons
review discussions r3438214406 and r3438217290: Use literal for 0.0f-style loads

decomp_lessons.lesson: Use PAD_STACK for stack padding tactics instead of dummy UNUSED u8 local buffers, and scope padding blocks if needed.
evidence_refs: review discussion r3438209956: Use PAD_STACK, with scope blocks if necessary
review hunk: added UNUSED u8 sp_pad[8]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Restore inline/helper usage when local source already has an authored helper form instead of rewriting through raw pointer arithmetic and manual object-array loads.
evidence_refs: review discussion r3438219962: Restore inline function usages
review hunk: HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Z calls changed to use raw pointer loads from un_804D6F10

decomp_lessons.lesson: Avoid leaving transient match-percentage comments in source after a matching improvement.
evidence_refs: review discussion r3438204573: empty suggestion on changed comment /* 96.8% match */ -> /* 99.7% match */

naming_conventions.text: THP local names in the diff use protocol/field-role terms where supported by context, such as jfif, found_jfif, comp_i, jfif_i, sampling, samplingH, samplingV, quantizationTableSelector, DCTableSelector, ACTableSelector, validHuffmanTabs, width, xSize, and ySize.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPScanComp and THPFrameHeaderComp field additions

naming_conventions.text: Address-style names such as THPDec_80330158 and un_8030715C remained where stronger semantic names were not shown by the PR evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPDec_80330158 signature updated but address-style name retained

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Signature/header repair for matching: recovered prototypes in thp.h were adjusted to match implementation changes.
Temporary local struct views were used in THPDec.c to type large work-area offsets and parsing state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPVideoDecodeInfoView, THPScanInfo, THPFrameHeaderInfo, THPHuffmanTabSizeEntry additions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK is the preferred stack-padding tactic when a stack-shape adjustment is needed; review rejected an UNUSED u8 sp_pad buffer.
Raw asm was attempted for THPInit but review requested reverting it, so this PR is evidence against treating asm replacement as normal matching style.

review_feedback.feedback: Restore the removed THPVideoDecode documentation comment.
review_feedback.author: ribbanya

review_feedback.feedback: Revert named float literal loads back to ordinary literals.
review_feedback.author: ribbanya

review_feedback.feedback: Remove a changed match-percentage source comment.
review_feedback.author: ribbanya

review_feedback.feedback: Use PAD_STACK, with scope blocks if necessary, instead of UNUSED u8 sp_pad.
review_feedback.author: ribbanya

review_feedback.feedback: Use literals instead of address-named float loads.
review_feedback.author: ribbanya

review_feedback.feedback: Restore inline function usages in the grid/display code.
review_feedback.author: ribbanya

accepted_candidate_records.title: Avoid include-time macro renames around real headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2733, a macro wrapper around <dolphin/thp/thp.h> to rename prototypes was reviewed down to a plain include. Treat this as evidence that recovered signatures should be reflected in the owning header rather than hidden behind temporary macro aliases.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use PAD_STACK rather than dummy local padding buffers
accepted_candidate_records.text: A toy.c hunk added UNUSED u8 sp_pad[8], and review requested PAD_STACK with scope blocks if necessary.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep ordinary float literals inline in toy/trophy display code
accepted_candidate_records.text: Review comments in toy.c and tydisplay.c asked to revert named float literal loads and use literals for values such as -3000.0F, 3000.0F, and 0.0f.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Raw asm is not acceptable as normal decomp replacement for THPInit
accepted_candidate_records.text: An asm BOOL THPInit body in THPDec.c was explicitly reviewed with 'Revert raw asm.'

source_update_candidates.title: Do not use macro-renamed includes to dodge prototype conflicts
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2733 provides concrete review evidence that wrapping a real header include with #define/#undef aliases for conflicting prototypes should be rejected in favor of truthful header updates.
source_update_candidates.reason: This reinforces existing truthful-headers/no-define-alias standards with a specific PR example.

source_update_candidates.title: Match-percentage comments are review noise
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2733 review removed a source comment that merely changed a match percentage from 96.8% to 99.7%.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be added as an example under authored-source style or cleanup guidance if curators want a standard/example for transient match-score comments.

source_update_candidates.title: THPDec.c is a THP decode matching hotspot in PR #2733
source_update_candidates.text: The PR body identifies extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c as the main review hotspot, and bot evidence lists multiple THPDec new matches/improvements.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped historical context, but should be curated as a PR-specific hint rather than a universal fact.

source_update_candidates.title: toy/tydisplay PR #2733 review preferred literals and inline helpers
source_update_candidates.text: In src/melee/ty/toy.c and src/melee/ty/tydisplay.c, review comments asked to use/revert literals and restore inline function usages.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential local historical context for future toy/trophy display decomp review.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all temporary THP local view structs are final accepted type names; the loaded diff shows their use, but not a curator-approved type model.
Do not infer final merge resolved every review comment exactly as requested; merge status is known, but final source after review is not fully loaded here.
Do not promote tyfigupon-specific lessons beyond 'matching improvements occurred'; loaded excerpts lack detailed tyfigupon hunks.
